---
title: "Our Process"
description: "A clear step-by-step overview of the case management process."
---

# Our Process

We keep the process clear, structured, and focused on practical outcomes.

::: {.process-timeline}

::: {.process-step}
### 1. Initial Contact

We receive the enquiry and consider whether case management support may be appropriate.
:::

::: {.process-step}
### 2. Discussion

We discuss the person's current situation, priorities, risks, and support needs.
:::

::: {.process-step}
### 3. Assessment

Where agreed, we complete or coordinate assessment to understand needs in more detail.
:::

::: {.process-step}
### 4. Planning

We help develop a practical, person-centred plan.
:::

::: {.process-step}
### 5. Coordination

We liaise with relevant services and professionals to support progress.
:::

:::

[Start a Referral](contact.qmd){.button-link}
